title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Match interface by PCI address identifier [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121109)  after the add-on NMSTATE operator automatically updated, NNCPs started to fail on OVS DB error [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121990)

full_text:
An update for nmstate is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Nmstate is a library with an accompanying command line tool that manages host networking settings in a declarative manner and aimed to satisfy enterprise needs to manage host networking through a northbound declarative API and multi provider support on the southbound.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RFE] Match interface by PCI address identifier [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121109)  after the add-on NMSTATE operator automatically updated, NNCPs started to fail on OVS DB error [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-121990)
